raw_excerpt: Claude Managed Agents at Code w/ Claude SF 2026 (May 12, 2026). Four new features: Dreaming (scheduled process reviews past sessions, surfaces patterns, curates memory); Multiagent orchestration (lead agent delegates to specialist subagents working in parallel on shared filesystem, each with own model/prompt/tools, traceable in Claude Console); Outcomes (developer-defined rubric, separate grader evaluates result in own context window, +10pt task success on hardest problems); Webhooks (notify when outcome is met). Claude Code rate limits doubled; Claude Opus API limits raised. Self-hosted sandboxes (Cloudflare/Daytona/Modal/Vercel) public beta; MCP tunnels research preview. Used by Spotify, Base44, Legora, Amplitude, Clay, Rogo.
